name: Solve NoRelease Cluster Instances
on:
  push:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      reps:
        description: "Number of runs per instance"
        required: false
        default: "10"

jobs:
  build-matrix:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    outputs:
      matrix: ${{ steps.make-matrix.outputs.matrix }}
      total: ${{ steps.make-matrix.outputs.total }}
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Build matrix
        id: make-matrix
        run: |
          REPS="${{ github.event.inputs.reps }}"
          if [ -z "$REPS" ]; then REPS=10; fi
          python -c "import glob,json,os; reps=int(os.environ['REPS']); files=sorted(glob.glob('test_data/data_demand_random/50/*0.5.dat')); jobs=[]; jid=0; [jobs.append({'job_id':(jid:=jid+1),'instance':f,'base':os.path.basename(f),'r':r}) for f in files for r in range(1,reps+1)]; json.dump(jobs, open('matrix.json','w')); print(json.dumps(jobs))"
          TOTAL=$(python -c "import json; print(len(json.load(open('matrix.json'))))")
          echo "matrix=$(cat matrix.json)" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "total=$TOTAL" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "Total jobs: $TOTAL"
        env:
          REPS: ${{ github.event.inputs.reps }}

  solve:
    needs: build-matrix
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 220
    strategy:
      fail-fast: false
      matrix:
        task: ${{ fromJson(needs.build-matrix.outputs.matrix) }}
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Build solver (NoRelease)
        run: g++ -std=c++17 C_Version/Funtion_noReleaseDate.cpp -O2 -o C_Version/read_data_noRelease
      - name: Run task (single run/job)
        run: |
          mkdir -p results
          # Keep log naming compatible with gha_write_run_meta (expects ..._A0_L0_r1.log for reps=1).
          SOL_OUT_DIR=results ./C_Version/read_data_noRelease '${{ matrix.task.instance }}' > results/${{ matrix.task.base }}_A0_L0_r1.log

          python gha_write_run_meta.py \
            --results-dir results \
            --base "${{ matrix.task.base }}" \
            --a "0" \
            --l "0" \
            --reps "1" \
            --job-id "${{ matrix.task.job_id }}" \
            --instance "${{ matrix.task.instance }}"

          # Rewrite run_index from 1 -> matrix.task.r so summary reflects the true repetition id.
          python - <<'PY'
          import json, pathlib
          p = pathlib.Path("results/meta_run1.json")
          d = json.loads(p.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
          d["run_index"] = int("${{ matrix.task.r }}")
          p.write_text(json.dumps(d, indent=2), encoding="utf-8")
          print(f"Adjusted run_index -> {d['run_index']} in {p}")
          PY
      - name: Upload artifact
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: solvenorelease-job-${{ matrix.task.job_id }}
          path: results/

  summarize:
    needs: [build-matrix, solve]
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    if: always()
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Download artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          path: downloaded
      - name: Build summary
        run: |
          python -c "import json,pathlib,csv; rows=[json.load(open(p)) for p in pathlib.Path('downloaded').rglob('meta_run*.json') if p.is_file()]; out=pathlib.Path('summary_no_release.csv'); f=open(out,'w',newline=''); fields=['job_id','instance','A','L','run_index','best_fitness','best_solution','best_multi_fitness','best_multi_solution','best_drone_avg_trip_time','best_multi_visit_trip_count','best_drone_trip_count','best_avg_customers_per_trip','best_multi_drone_avg_trip_time','best_multi_multi_visit_trip_count','best_multi_drone_trip_count','best_multi_avg_customers_per_trip','best_solution_file','best_multi_solution_file','log']; w=csv.DictWriter(f,fieldnames=fields,extrasaction='ignore'); w.writeheader(); w.writerows(sorted(rows,key=lambda x:(x['job_id'], x.get('run_index',0)))); f.close(); print(f'Wrote {len(rows)} rows to {out}')"
      - name: Upload summary
        if: always()
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: solvenorelease-summary
          path: summary_no_release.csv
